domains.name: boards
domains.description: Governance structure, authority, public access, and decision-making for boards and committees
domains.questionPromptScope: Focus on board member makeup, meetings, availability of agendas and minutes
questionPromptRequirements: ask about how many people are on the board vs vacancies
does the board's web page indicate the ongoing projects and work
does the website provide clear and timely guidance for specific questions users may have

domains.name: projects
domains.questionPromptScope: Focus on planning, execution, upkeep, and outcomes for conservation-focused projects, including habitat rehabilitation, garden maintenance, vine cuttings, and educational programs.
questionPromptRequirements: is there documentation/photographs about past projects
how easy is it for the average person to get involved

domains.name: trees
domains.description: Tree removal, planting, and maintenance regulations

domains.name: wildlife
domains.description: Wildlife protection, habitat conservation, and biodiversity regulations
domains.questionPromptScope: Focus on wildlife protection, habitat conservation, and biodiversity regulations, including wildlife corridors and specific protections for amphibians, birds, and turtles.
questionPromptRequirements: what regulations exist for wildlife protection and habitat conservation
are there specific protections for amphibians, birds, or turtles
are there any designated wildlife corridors or protected habitats

domains.name: planting
domains.description: Native plant promotion, pollinator-friendly landscaping, and habitat restoration regulations
domains.questionPromptScope: Focus on native plant promotion, pollinator-friendly landscaping, and habitat restoration regulations.
questionPromptRequirements: what regulations exist for native plant promotion and pollinator-friendly landscaping
are there specific protections for pollinators
are there any designated areas for habitat restoration
what projects does your community have to promote native plants and pollinators
